name: Plum Chicken
recipeIngredient: Skinned, boned and split into halves (about 1 lb)
1/4 teaspoon fennel seeds, crushed (or anise seeds, crushed)
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the chicken and pat it dry. Place in a 9x13 baking dish.
2. In a small bowl, mix together all of the remaining ingredients.
3. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
4. Bake the chicken, uncovered, in a 400°F oven until the meat is no longer pink in its thickest part (about 25 minutes).
5. Serve the chicken with the sauce on top. Enjoy!
